Uses of Class
org.apache.bookkeeper.bookie.Journal

Packages that use Journal
Package
Description
org.apache.bookkeeper.bookie
Provides a Bookie server that stores entries for clients.
org.apache.bookkeeper.tools.cli.commands.bookie
Commands to operate a single bookie.

    Methods in org.apache.bookkeeper.bookie with parameters of type Journal
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    (package private) abstract CompletableFuture<Boolean>
    LedgerDescriptor.fenceAndLogInJournal(Journal journal)
    When we fence a ledger, we need to first set ledger to fenced state in memory and then log the fence entry in Journal so that we can rebuild the state.
    (package private) CompletableFuture<Boolean>
    LedgerDescriptorImpl.fenceAndLogInJournal(Journal journal)
